body:
I think the hacker and security community for computer
viruses should be asked to help defin the behavior or
real viruses.... point of entry , transmssion,
remssion, sweeps, etc

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> Cecilia,
> 
> Nathan Wolfe and I spoke by phone. He's a
> biological-virus
> scientist/epidemiologist interested in monitoring
> novel, emerging
> harmful viruses that move from animal hosts to
> humans. He's
> interested in connecting with folks who monitor
> novel emerging
> computer viruses, and I may help him with that.
> Is Jeffrey specifically interested in my
> facilitating the "compare
> and contrast" of the problems of monitoring new DNA
> viruses and of
> new computer viruses?
> 
> Thanks,
> David
> 
> 
> At 08:51 AM 7/24/2006, you wrote:
> >David,
> >Nathan Wolf will call you in regards to whatever it
> is you do! He's
> >a computer hacker/virus guy. Jeffrey suggested he'd
> call you and work w/
> you.

> >Cecilia :)
>

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Cecilia,

Nathan Wolfe and I spoke by phone. He's a
biological-virus
scientist/epidemiologist interested in monitoring
novel, emerging
harmful viruses that move from animal hosts to
humans. He's
interested in connecting with folks who monitor
novel emerging
computer viruses, and I may help him with that.
Is Jeffrey specifically interested in my
facilitating the "compare
and contrast" of the problems of monitoring new DNA
viruses and of
new computer viruses?

Thanks,
David

At 08:51 AM 7/24/2006, you wrote:

David,
Nathan Wolf will call you in regards to whatever it
is you do! He's
a computer hacker/virus guy. Jeffrey suggested he'd
call you and work w/
you.

Cecilia :)

subject: Re: David Grosof
body:
no. you shouldn't confer... you can talk to george
church and get up to speed on the personal gemonics
that he is doing,,, i will hire post docs to work for
him,,, i want to know what others are doing in this
are,,, So far you have not told me anything....

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> 
> Is it okay for me to confer with Steve Kosslyn? More
> generally, do
> I have a free hand to consult with scientists to
> help you identify
> and refine funding opportunities?
> Reason I ask: you may not want me to confer widely
> in order that
> your advisors' opinions be more independent.
> 
> Regards,
> David
>

Jeffrey,

Is it okay for me to confer with Steve Kosslyn? More
generally, do
I have a free hand to consult with scientists to
help you identify
and refine funding opportunities?
Reason I ask: you may not want me to confer widely
in order that
your advisors' opinions be more independent.

Regards,
David
